ogTitle: Nords Wharf vs Normanhurst: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nords Wharf and Normanhurst.
heading: Nords Wharf vs Normanhurst — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nords Wharf, New South Wales and Normanhurst, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Normanhurst has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Nords Wharf (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nords Wharf or Normanhurst safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nords Wharf has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Normanhurst scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nords Wharf scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Normanhurst scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nords Wharf or Normanhurst?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Normanhurst has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.42% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
